task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into LibreHealth EHR and accessed a specific patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR web interface is open in a browser, showing a patient's dashboard or chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a new encounter for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active 'New Encounter' form, tab, or screen is visible within the patient's chart in LibreHealth.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Blood Pressure, Pulse, and Respiration values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vital signs data entry form shows Systolic BP as 128, Diastolic BP as 82, Pulse as 76, and Respiration as 16.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Temperature, Oxygen Saturation, Height, and Weight values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vital signs data entry form shows Temperature as 98.6, Oxygen Saturation as 98, Height as 68, and Weight as 185.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the entered vital signs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save confirmation message, a read-only view of the saved vitals, or the vitals appearing in the patient's encounter history/summary.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the actual LibreHealth EHR application UI, rather than terminal commands (like curl or SQL injections) being used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the vital signs were entered into the actual EHR form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values are typed into the specific input fields for vital signs in the EHR, not just written in a generic text editor, notepad, or a single free-text clinical note.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the target patient file to identify who to search for.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor showing the contents of '/tmp/target_patient.txt' being read before the patient is searched in the EHR.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target vital signs to verify in the LibreHealth EHR: Systolic BP: 128 mmHg, Diastolic BP: 82 mmHg, Pulse: 76 bpm, Temperature: 98.6 F (tolerance ±0.1°F), Respiration: 16 per minute, Oxygen Saturation: 98%, Height: 68 inches (tolerance ±0.5 inches), Weight: 185 lbs (tolerance ±0.5 lbs).
